description: Discussion on Solana community validator updates, including staking plans and new tools.
topic_summary: The meeting covers validator updates, the introduction of Ben Hawkins as the new head of staking, and discussions on the rollout plan for version 1.14.17, with a focus on security and testing. Marinade will also present new staking products towards the end of the session. [t=2:16] [t=6:48] [t=14:56] [t=35:97] [t=75:99]
